name: Paper
visual_summary: A container component that can be used to group and display other content. It can be used when you need to add a border and some padding to a section of your UI. It's similar to a div, but with more styling options.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready other component with the following characteristics:

Name: Paper
Description: A container component that can be used to group and display other content. It can be used when you need to add a border and some padding to a section of your UI. It's similar to a div, but with more styling options.
Style: e.g. minimal, bordered
Interactions: 
Tags: container, layout, box

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
// packages/@mantine/core/src/components/Paper/index.ts
import type {
  PaperBaseProps,
  PaperCssVariables,
  PaperFactory,
  PaperProps,
  PaperStylesNames,
} from './Paper';

export { Paper } from './Paper';

export type { PaperProps, PaperStylesNames, PaperCssVariables, PaperFactory, PaperBaseProps };
